headline: Will Expedia (EXPE) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Expedia (EXPE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Clearbridge Mid Cap Strategy Sold Expedia Group (EXPE) on Appreciation
summary: ClearBridge Investments, a global equity manager, recently published first-quarter 2026 commentary for its “Mid Cap Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Mid-cap stocks showed strong performance in Q1, with the Russell Midcap Index rising 1.3%, outperforming both large-cap and small-cap stocks. In contrast, large-cap equities dropped 4.2%, while small-caps increased by only […]
